name: trek-plugin-dev
description: Build, test, sign, and publish plugins for TREK, the self-hosted travel planner.

interface.shortDescription: Build, test, and publish TREK plugins
interface.longDescription: Covers the trek-plugin.json manifest and its permission catalog, the definePlugin server API and ctx object, the sandboxed iframe postMessage bridge, egress rules, the trek-plugin-sdk CLI, Ed25519 author signing, and the TREK-Plugins registry with every CI gate.
defaultPrompt: Scaffold a TREK plugin and wire up its manifest permissions
